# Forge & Flame Custom Metalworks

> Custom welding and metal fabrication in Thunder Bay, Ontario. 25 years of craftsmanship serving the Lakehead region and Northwestern Ontario.

## Business

- **Name:** Forge & Flame Custom Metalworks
- **Trade:** Welding & Custom Metal Fabrication
- **Location:** Thunder Bay, Ontario, Canada
- **Service Area:** Thunder Bay, Lakehead region, and Northwestern Ontario
- **Phone:** (807) 555-0173
- **Email:** info@forgeandflame.ca
- **Website:** https://forgeandflame.ca

## Services

- Structural steel fabrication and welding
- Ornamental ironwork (gates, railings, fences)
- Custom metal furniture and artistic pieces
- Industrial equipment fabrication and repair
- On-site welding and mobile services
- Custom architectural metalwork
- Stainless steel and aluminium fabrication

## About

Forge & Flame is Thunder Bay's only shop combining ornamental ironwork and structural welding under one roof. With 25 years of experience, we serve residential, commercial, and industrial clients across Northwestern Ontario. Every project is fabricated in-house with a focus on precision, durability, and craftsmanship suited to Northern Ontario's demanding conditions.

## Key Differentiators

- Combined ornamental and structural capability under one roof
- 25 years serving the Thunder Bay and Lakehead region
- In-house fabrication — no outsourcing
- Mobile and on-site welding services available
- One-year workmanship warranty on all structural welds

- Privacy Policy: https://forgeandflame.ca/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://forgeandflame.ca/terms
